message:

Market posture: risk_off | 신규 매수는 GATE 통과 종목만 소액 검토

SELL review: 10
Catalyst watch: 1

US tape: SPY 1.71% / QQQ 2.05% / SOXX -0.3% / EWY -5.96% / ^VIX -12.18% / KRW=X 0.4% / CL=F -1.82%
